title: Change footer copyright/bottom bar text to white

requirements.text: In the footer component, change the text color of the bottom bar div (the 4th child div inside the footer's inner container, corresponding to XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/footer[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]) to white (text-white). This is likely the copyright bar or bottom row of the footer.
acceptanceCriteria: The text in the 4th section/div of the footer (bottom bar, e.g. copyright bar) renders in white (#ffffff).
No other footer sections are affected by this change.
Change applies to both HoustonFooter.tsx and Footer.tsx if they share the same structure at that position.

constraints: Only modify the specific footer element identified by the XPath: the 4th child div's inner div in the footer container.
Do not alter other footer sections or any non-footer components.
nonGoals: Changing text colors in any other section of the page.
Modifying footer layout, padding, or background colors.
